prompt:
Standardize prod workflows — final cleanup for issue #24.

## Changes needed

### 1. Rename prod.yml → flux-prod.yml
Rename .github/workflows/prod.yml to .github/workflows/flux-prod.yml
Update the workflow name from 'Deploy to Production' or similar to 'Deploy Flux Production'

### 2. Ensure consistent structure across all three prod workflows
All three prod workflows (flux-prod.yml, balance-prod.yml, web-prod.yml) should have identical structure:
- Trigger: workflow_dispatch only
- Guard: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
- Environment: production
- persist-credentials: false on checkout
- Steps: checkout → nix → generate fly.toml → build OCI → ensure app exists → load image → smoke test → push image → deploy → configure custom domains

### 3. Add smoke tests to all prod workflows
Check which prod workflows are missing smoke tests and add them. The pattern:
```yaml
- name: Smoke test
  run: |
    docker run -d --name smoke-test -p 8080:8080 <image>:latest
    sleep 3
    curl -f http://localhost:8080/<health-path> || (docker logs smoke-test && exit 1)
    docker stop smoke-test && docker rm smoke-test
```

Health paths:
- flux: /
- balance: /api/health
- web: /

### 4. Ensure consistent naming in workflow 'name' field
- flux-prod.yml: name: 'Deploy Flux Production'
- balance-prod.yml: name: 'Deploy Balance Production' 
- web-prod.yml: name: 'Deploy Web Production'

## Files to modify
- .github/workflows/prod.yml → rename to .github/workflows/flux-prod.yml, update name, add smoke test if missing
- .github/workflows/balance-prod.yml → update name if needed, add smoke test if missing
- .github/workflows/web-prod.yml → update name if needed, add smoke test if missing

## Acceptance criteria
- No more prod.yml (renamed to flux-prod.yml)
- All three prod workflows have identical structure
- All have smoke tests
- All have consistent naming
- All pass zizmor (persist-credentials: false)
- YAML is valid
